hero.headline: Loyalty that works wherever you sell
hero.subhead: One loyalty programme across your POS, online store, and dashboard. Start in minutes.
hero.cta_disclaimer: Credit card required. Cancel anytime before trial ends via Stripe.

pricing.disclaimer: 30-day free trial. Card required. Cancel anytime via Stripe.
pricing.channel_note: Channel partners — billing on their side. See the partner's app market for pricing.

cc.q: Why do you need my credit card up front?
cc.a: Card-on-file blocks signup spam and lets the trial roll into a paid subscription cleanly. You're not charged until the trial ends, and you can cancel anytime via Stripe.

charge.a: Your card is authorised today (no charge), and the first $29 charge happens 30 days after signup unless you cancel before then.

cookies.banner: We use essential cookies to operate this site, and optional analytics to measure signup performance.

wordpress.desc: Drop-in plugin for WordPress and WooCommerce stores.

shopify.desc: One-click install from the Shopify App Store.

eposnow.desc: Native EPOS Now integration for in-person retail and hospitality.

zapier.desc: Connect to 6,000+ apps without writing code.

standalone.desc: No store yet? Run a loyalty programme directly from your dashboard.
